embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: multi
Title: dws_fox_boc_behavior_log_d
Description: 催收与触达行为日志宽表，承载触达工具、接通状态和行为时长等字段。
Purpose: Promoted from M2B structured extraction candidate asset.
Grain: dt plus debtor_id plus behavior_type plus source_id
Join keys: debtor_id, asset_id, asset_item_no, source_id
Time field: behavior_time
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: dws.dws_fox_boc_behavior_log_d
Notes: This table is suitable for collection behavior semantics, not generic app-event writeback.
title: dws_fox_boc_behavior_log_d

embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: multi
Title: dws_user_renewal_loan_seg_d
Description: 续贷用户每日分层状态表，用于 MOB、结清、在贷、逾期和可经营分层。
Purpose: Promoted from M2B structured extraction candidate asset.
Grain: user_uuid plus dt
Join keys: user_uuid
Time field: dt
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: dws.dws_user_renewal_loan_seg_d
Notes: This table is for daily renewal-state segmentation and should not be used as a pure new-user source.
title: dws_user_renewal_loan_seg_d

embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: mx
Title: dwb_b1_data_burying_point
Description: 客户端埋点事件表，用于行为回溯、writeback 和反欺诈行为分析。
Purpose: Promoted from M2B structured extraction candidate asset.
Grain: uid plus event timestamp
Join keys: uid
Time field: timestamp_
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: hive.dwb.dwb_b1_data_burying_point
Notes: Behavior retrieval must stay cohort-constrained and avoid broad scans.
title: dwb_b1_data_burying_point

embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: mx
Title: dwb_r_apply
Description: 征信与审核申请宽表，承载申请状态与审核时间字段。
Purpose: Promoted from M2B structured extraction candidate asset.
Grain: apply_uuid
Join keys: apply_uuid, apply_user_uuid, apply_ask_loan_uuid
Time field: apply_created_at
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: hive.dwb.dwb_r_apply
Notes: The physical user field family is apply_user_uuid and may require canonical review against generic user_uuid wording.
title: dwb_r_apply

embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: mx
Title: dwd_w_apply
Description: 墨西哥申请、提现、放款、逾期和结清核心明细表。
Purpose: Promoted from M2B structured extraction candidate asset.
Grain: apply_uuid with loan and withdrawal context
Join keys: apply_uuid, ask_loan_uuid, user_uuid, withdraw_uuid
Time field: apply_create_at
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: hive.dwd.dwd_w_apply
Notes: This table is the main grounding source for first-loan, true-withdraw, settlement, and overdue semantics. | dt is mainly for partition pruning.
title: dwd_w_apply

embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: mx
Title: dwd_w_user
Description: 墨西哥用户主表，承载注册来源、申请来源和注册时间等用户基础属性。
Purpose: Promoted from M2B structured extraction candidate asset.
Grain: user_uuid
Join keys: user_uuid, individual_uuid
Time field: user_create_time
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: hive.dwd.dwd_w_user
Notes: dt is a partition field and should not replace user_create_time for business-time filtering.
title: dwd_w_user

embedding_text:
Asset family: catalog_table
Country: mx
Title: ods_f_market_app_categories
Description: 应用分类映射表，提供安装包、应用名称和 AI 类目标签。

Grain: app_package plus year_day snapshot
Join keys: app_package
Time field: year_day
Partition field: dt
Physical table names: hive.ods.ods_f_market_app_categories
Notes: year_day is the business snapshot field for category extraction.

Country: th

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: common
Title: first_loan
Definition: 用户借款序列中的第一笔真实借款，需要优先使用行内顺序或首贷标签判定。 优先关联真实提现/放款订单字段，而不是只停留在用户级语义。
Synonyms: 首贷, first loan, 首次借款, 第一笔借款, first borrowing, 首借, 首贷提现, first withdraw, loan order
Mapped tables: dwd_w_apply
Mapped fields: user_uuid, withdraw_uuid, asset_grant_at, apply_create_at
Suggested filters: withdraw_uuid, first_loan, asset_grant_at, apply_create_at
title: first_loan

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: common
Title: fully_settled
Definition: 所有分期都满足结清条件，且最后结清时间可用于后续观察窗口。 用于 mob1 场景时，至少需要结清时间、放款时间和借款订单字段可见。
Synonyms: 完全结清, 全部结清, 结清, 已结清, full settlement, 结清满7天, settled over 7d, 完成还款
Mapped tables: dwd_w_apply
Mapped fields: asset_finish_at, asset_grant_at, withdraw_uuid
Suggested filters: asset_finish_at, settlement_over_7d
title: fully_settled

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: common
Title: mob1
Definition: 首贷、完全结清、结清满七天且七天内无复借的流失客群语义。 runtime grounding 必须同时覆盖首贷、完全结清、结清满7天和7天内未复借四个条件。
Synonyms: mob1客群, mob1提取, 结清7天未复借, 首贷结清流失, settled 7d no reborrow, mob1 churn
Mapped tables: dwd_w_apply
Mapped fields: user_uuid, withdraw_uuid, asset_grant_at, asset_finish_at, apply_create_at
Suggested filters: first_loan, fully_settled, settlement_over_7d, no_reborrow_within_7d
title: mob1

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: common
Title: never_overdue
Definition: 在观察范围内没有出现逾期天数大于零的记录。 从未逾期语义应优先映射资产逾期和历史最大逾期字段。
Synonyms: 从未逾期, never overdue, 未逾期, 没有逾期, 0逾期, never overdue user, 无逾期, never overdue history, max overdue
Mapped tables: dwd_w_apply, ph_apply_orders
Mapped fields: asset_overdue_days, max_overdue_days, history_overdue_count, real_overdue_days
Suggested filters: asset_overdue_days, max_overdue_days, real_overdue_days
title: never_overdue

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: common
Title: seven_day_no_reborrow_churn
Definition: 在结清时间后的七天观察窗口内没有产生新的真实借款。 该语义需要同时关联结清时间、观察期和复借排除条件。
Synonyms: 结清七天未复借流失, 7天未复借流失, 7天内未复借, 未复借, no reborrow within 7 days, seven_day_no_reborrow, 结清7天未复借, 首贷结清流失, no_reborrow_within_7d
Mapped tables: dwd_w_apply
Mapped fields: withdraw_uuid, asset_finish_at, apply_create_at, asset_grant_at
Suggested filters: withdraw_uuid, apply_create_at, no_reborrow_within_7d, asset_finish_at
title: seven_day_no_reborrow_churn

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: multi
Title: collection_behavior
Definition: 贷后催收与触达过程中的行为日志语义。
Synonyms: 催收行为, 触达行为, collection touch behavior, 贷后催收行为
Mapped tables: dws_fox_boc_behavior_log_d
Mapped fields: behavior_type, behavior_time, contact_type
Suggested filters: none
title: collection_behavior

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: multi
Title: contact_outcome

Synonyms: 触达结果, 接通结果, contact result, 触达状态
Mapped tables: dws_fox_boc_behavior_log_d
Mapped fields: behavior_status_name, contact_type
Suggested filters: none
title: contact_outcome

embedding_text:
Asset family: glossary_term
Country: multi
Title: settled_over_3m

Synonyms: 结清超过3个月, 结清满3个月, settled over 3 months, 3m settled
Mapped tables: dws_user_renewal_loan_seg_d
Mapped fields: last_finish_time, mob_code
Suggested filters: none
title: settled_over_3m

embedding_text:
Asset family: sql_example
Country: mx
Title: sql_pattern.mx.behavior_writeback_target_cohort
Request: behavior writeback pattern
Pattern summary: build target_users CTE first | join behavior table by uid or mapped user identifier | keep event window relative to request or cohort business event | return only the required behavior payload columns return uid timestamp_ eventname as the minimum behavior writeback payload | preserve uid to user_uuid join semantics without treating them as globally equivalent fields
Tables used: none
Fields used: uid, timestamp_, eventname
Run type: bucket_writeback
Output bucket: behavior
Non-executable pattern guidance.
This record is not executable SQL.
title: sql_pattern.mx.behavior_writeback_target_cohort

embedding_text:
Asset family: sql_example
Country: mx
Title: sql_pattern.mx.mob1_churn_cte
Request: mob1 churn pattern
Pattern summary: build first-loan cohort in a dedicated CTE | aggregate settlement state before churn labeling | apply a seven-day observation guard before anti-join reborrow exclusion carry withdraw_uuid together with asset_grant_at and asset_finish_at for mob1 lifecycle grounding | surface first_loan fully_settled settlement_over_7d and no_reborrow_within_7d semantics in the pattern guidance
Tables used: none
Fields used: user_uuid, withdraw_uuid, asset_finish_at
Run type: cohort_query
Output bucket: none
Non-executable pattern guidance.
This record is not executable SQL.
title: sql_pattern.mx.mob1_churn_cte
